zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Burnell於1372年出生在英國戴文素斯 塔福頓時，她的父親John Burnell29歲，母親Katherine de Cruke22歲。她於大約1398年與William Wake在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1435年在英國戴文享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Burnell于1372年出生在英国戴文素斯 塔福頓时，她的父亲John Burnell29岁，母亲Katherine de Cruke22岁。她于大约1398年与William Wake在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1435年在英国戴文享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Burnel, a metathesized form of Old French Brunel, originally a nickname for someone with brown hair or complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Burnell was born in 1372, in South Tawton, Devon, England, her father, John Burnell, was 29 and her mother, Katherine de Cruke, was 22. She married William Wake about 1398, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1435, in Devon, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Burnell est née en 1372, à South Tawton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Burnell, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Cruke, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William Wake environ 1398, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1435, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Burnell 1372 in South Tawton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Burnell 29 und ihre Mutter Katherine de Cruke 22. Sie hat um 1398 in Devon, England, United Kingdom William Wake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1435 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Devon, England.

Lei sposato William Wake circa 1398, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1435, nel Devon, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Burnellが1372年にイギリスデボンソウス タウトンで生まれた時，父John Burnellは29歳，母Katherine de Crukeは22歳であった。約1398年にイギリスイギリスデボンでWilliam Wakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1435年にイギリスデボンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Burnell(이)가 1372년 영국 데폰 소우스 타w턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Burnell(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine de Cruke(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 William Wake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1435년 영국 데폰에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Burnell nasceu em 1372, em South Tawton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Burnell, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Cruke, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William Wake aproximadamente 1398, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1435, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Burnell родилась в 1372 г. в местности соут тавтон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Burnell было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Cruke, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Wake около 1398 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1435 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.
